g.text: Journal Write-Ahead Protocol: Atomic Recovery Specification (v1.2.0)

ul.li: Inconsistency: Bitmap marks block as used, but Inode does not point to it.
Leak: 1 Block leaked until fsck run.
Atomicity: JE_COMMIT block ensures all-or-nothing durability.

g.text: --- L1 Cache Line Boundary (64B Alignment Check) ---
